metadata.name: Resolve an Invoice GL Coding Error

description: A department manager has rejected a non-PO invoice approval request because it was coded to the wrong GL account.

nodes.task_description: Receive the rejected invoice notification, noting the reason 'Incorrect GL Code'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the rejected invoice and the reason for rejection.

nodes.task_description: Review the invoice and the manager's comment to determine the correct GL account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent determines the invoice for 'Software Subscription' should be coded to 'IT Expenses', not 'Office Supplies'.

nodes.task_description: Update the GL code on the invoice.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully changes the GL code.

nodes.task_description: Resubmit the invoice to the department manager for approval.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent re-routes the corrected invoice for approval.
